channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hardware Wallet Thief Gets 78 Months in Prison Over $250M Crypto 'Heist'
item.description: ‘GothFerrari’ was sentenced for his part in a criminal enterprise that stole crypto through social engineering and physical break-ins.

item.title: The metaverse isn't a place: Why Animoca’s Yat Siu says the future is 100 billion AI agents
item.description: Yat Siu said the metaverse is evolving beyond immersive digital worlds, with AI agents increasingly handling commerce, payments and coordination through blockchain infrastructure in the background.

item.title: Luffa unveils major brand upgrade: Repositioned as AI × Web3 Super Connector
item.description: Luffa, the global leader in intelligent ecosystem platforms, today officially announced a major brand upgrade, repositioning itself as the AI × Web3 Super Connector.

item.title: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal
item.description: Bithumb’s tie-up with SSI Digital positions it for Vietnam’s strict crypto exchange pilot as competition for scarce licenses heats up and scrutiny mounts at home.

item.title: Quantum attacks could worsen without proof of ownership: Near One
item.description: Near One says blockchains may need new ownership verification systems if quantum attacks compromise wallet keys and expose private assets.

item.title: Samourai Wallet co-founder appeals for donations to pay $2M legal fees
item.description: Samourai Wallet co-founder Keonne Rodriguez said mounting legal debt and fading pardon hopes could force him to serve his full prison sentence.

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin reports $82M Q1 loss, revenue miss
item.description: Donald Trump’s sons’ company, American Bitcoin, missed analyst revenue estimates and posted narrower losses as it ramped up its mining capacity.

item.title: 🔥 TODAY: Michael Saylor says, “I think digital credit is the bridge between Bitcoin and crypto, between Tradfi and DeFi.” “It solves a lot of problems in the crypto and DeFi space while leveraging all TradFi assets as well.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9HZWVXOG1fazlZaE1CRlVkSTBqZ1R5WHJ5Z1F5TnRwQ3lrdzU0MGVmQUVTZHBGbDBPa25ITHRLdFBvY0EydHZwUGVudkN1MVA4WWhWclk5Q0hOeGh6RDBXczUwVXM?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 TODAY: Michael Saylor says, …

item.title: UAE-regulated stablecoins to develop AED-USD conversion rails for institutional settlement
item.description: The system enables near-instant conversion between UAE dirham and US dollar stablecoins within the country’s regulated payment token regime.

item.title: Bitcoin lenders say institutions want crypto credit to look more like TradFi
item.description: At Consensus 2026 in Miami, executives from Two Prime, Ledn and Lygos Finance said institutional borrowers increasingly prioritize custody, transparency and standardized lending structures over complex DeFi products after the crypto credit…

item.title: Trump family-backed American Bitcoin's costs dropped 23% in Q1 as mining industry pivots to AI
item.description: The Trump family-linked miner cut its cost per Bitcoin to roughly $36,200 from $46,900 in Q4 2025, putting it among the lowest-cost public mining operations at a moment when most of its peers are toning down business.

item.title: BNY Expands Crypto Custody Push to Abu Dhabi BNY, the world’s largest custodian bank, plans to offer digital asset custody services in Abu Dhabi through local partners Finstreet and ADI Foundation, while building regulated digital asset infrastructure ancho - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9WdGhMTEFiNDlYdV9fTWtPTVNqY3AtR0o5bDVqc1lsV1JTMDc3TlF2NnAwcXkwVlRMa2lHSTNEbUk1Wk1teWV2SEFPdXhZWXRhb21jeGQxZ1BEUzNZdmdwTHRiTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BNY Expands Crypto Custody Push …

item.title: Three signals pointing to a possible bitcoin move to $85,000
item.description: Bitcoin is showing a rare alignment across on-chain data, futures positioning, and options flows that points to further upside.

item.title: BNY, world's largest custody bank, expands crypto services in Abu Dhabi
item.description: The Wall Street giant, which oversees $59 trillion in client assets, teamed up with Finstreet and ADI Foundation for digital asset infrastructure.

item.title: Aave liquidates Kelp DAO hacker's rsETH positions on Ethereum, Arbitrum
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Thaddeus Pinakiewicz noted that Aave is now only 10% short of recovering from the bad debt that hit its lending protocol after the Kelp DAO hack.

item.title: Ripple, JPMorgan settle first cross-border tokenized Treasury redemption on XRP Ledger
item.description: The pilot, run with Ondo Finance and Mastercard, processed the redemption of Ondo's OUSG tokenized Treasury fund in under five seconds.

item.title: Dogecoin slides 4%, bitcoin rally pauses as Iran ceasefire optimism lifts equities
item.description: Crypto majors took a breather Thursday after a strong run, with bitcoin holding around $81,000 and ether slipping below $2,330 as global equities pushed to fresh records on hopes of a US-Iran deal.

item.title: Stablecoin adoption to scale on back of big tech firms: Bitwise
item.description: Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan says projections tipping stablecoins to hit $4 trillion in value by 2030 could happen if major tech firms continue to adopt them.

item.title: JPMorgan, Mastercard make first cross-border US Treasury transfer via XRP Ledger
item.description: The cross-border tokenized US Treasury transaction using blockchain and banking rails builds on an earlier pilot in which the same fund moved between a public and permissioned blockchain.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Aave has liquidated the attacker's rsETH positions on Ethereum and Arbitrum. The recovered collateral now held by the Recovery Guardian as part of the ongoing restoration roadmap. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBTZXRMaHpzNnUyYXZwVzVQd3JOa2sta1BuWjZXUlloZk5CTUlFQWRyMzd2bzBMTS1uMERyYkxoLU1SSzBpbDZEU2I2cF9GTGg4ZXNRcjh4WkUwYUdqTVJjcFFIVEU?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Aave has liquidated …

item.title: Three reasons why Ether price rallies fizzle near $2.4K
item.description: Ether rallies are abruptly capped at $2,400 and multiple data points suggest this pattern will remain in play for the foreseeable future.

item.title: AI agents becoming more relevant than humans by 2035 has Big Tech 'terrified', says Hoskinson
item.description: The founder and CEO of Cardano’s Input Output said Google, Amazon and Facebook are terrified because AI agents will not behave like humans when confronted with ads.

item.title: Grant Cardone says bitcoin-real estate strategy could outperform REITs, adds more BTC to treasury
item.description: The real-estate mogul said the hybrid model brings new users into crypto and challenges traditional real estate structures.

item.title: Nasdaq's president says the SEC’s new crypto stance is letting markets 'build' again
item.description: Nasdaq’s Tal Cohen said a friendlier SEC is giving crypto firms and exchanges room to experiment with tokenization and digital market infrastructure.

item.title: Wall Street's clearinghouse seeks 'high-performance' blockchains to tokenize corporate actions
item.description: DTCC CEO Frank La Salla said the clearing giant is working with layer-1 blockchains to bring millions in corporate actions like dividend payments onchain, but challenges remain.

item.title: Crypto’s mainstream moment has arrived, say industry leaders speaking at Consensus Miami
item.description: Executives from Binance, Revolut and Circle say crypto is evolving beyond speculation into the financial infrastructure powering payments, remittances and broader global access.

item.title: Bitcoin’s post-quantum migration will be harder than Taproot and needs to start now, Project Eleven CEO says
item.description: Alex Pruden said the asymmetry between acting on a post-quantum signature scheme today and waiting for certainty about quantum-computing hardware timelines means Bitcoin developers should move from research into production.

item.title: Pi Founder Chengdiao Fan spoke today at Consensus 2026 Miami in her session, “Aligning Web3, AI, and Blockchain for Utility.” Dr. Fan shared how Pi’s blockchain infrastructure, identity verification, and a globally engaged network can support utility-driven p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1yeW1qRmZhS0ViRXozamNoTFo3N1prVzhHemFZOVdKMzFQMVFVX05KQkNRS2FVQnFsaklUVlZ3X0htNE5fdjlYY2djUU54c0RzVjQyQnkxdDhnbXNIdFpzOQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Pi Founder Chengdiao Fan spoke today…

item.title: Reid Hoffman says NFTs may make a comeback as AI agents strain online identity
item.description: The Greylock partner and LinkedIn co-founder said autonomous agents will need crypto-based trust systems to transact across the open internet.

item.title: Chrome Is Quietly Installing a 4GB AI Model on Your Computer—And Putting It Back If You Delete It
item.description: Google Chrome silently downloads a 4GB Gemini Nano model to eligible devices, re-downloads it if deleted, and the AI Mode button users actually see doesn't even use it.

item.title: Bitcoin market dominance moves above 61%: Will altcoins follow?
item.description: Bitcoin's market dominance climbed above 61% as BTC led crypto market flows. Data also showed Binance-listed altcoins' share of volume hitting 49% in March.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs solved access, but custody, advisors and plumbing still lag, panelists say
item.description: Senior figures from CoinShares, Calamos, ProShares and Flow Traders flagged Coinbase-heavy custody concentration, modest advisor uptake and creation-flow inefficiency as being among the next set of problems to solve.

item.title: U.S. Bitcoin Reserve update coming in 'next few weeks," White House adviser says
item.description: White House digital-assets adviser Patrick Witt cited a recent exploit involving assets held by the U.S. Marshals as proof federal crypto holdings need safeguarding.

item.title: This AI Reads Your Chemistry Instructions and Finds the Best Way to Build You a Molecule
item.description: Researchers at EPFL built a framework that lets chemists describe what they want in plain language—and have AI sift through thousands of synthesis routes to find the right one.

item.title: White House targets July 4 for Clarity Act passage, says crypto adviser Patrick Witt
item.description: The executive director of the President's Council of Advisors for Digital Assets said the Senate Banking Committee hearing will happen this month on market structure. bill.

item.title: Dominance of Tether and Circle is a net bad for stablecoins, says Bridge executive
item.description: Circle and Tether are going to make it harder for stablecoins to feel like money, said Ben O'Neill, head of money movement at Bridge.

item.title: US senator says crypto market structure vote may happen by August
item.description: Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said the Senate must address lawmakers potentially getting “rich off of these industries because of their insider status“ before any vote on the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum 'Q-Day' Quantum Threat Could Arrive as Soon as 2030: Report
item.description: By the time Bitcoin and other networks are ready to defend themselves, it may already be too late, according to a new analysis.

item.title: . @EricTrump: "JPMorgan was crapping all over Bitcoin 18 months ago, saying it was a joke asset." Now they're issuing home mortgages against Bitcoin holdings. "This happened in a period of 18 months, my friends." On the @Anchorage Digital Mainstage at - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBQS3NwVnAwcC1xUjhEeHBvSG5sMEk4VWdoQmkxWHhlVHFKTkFyWW1oSTlndDZBTjh5bEVZT3Q2aW5NM2xEeDJKTEQxNjlCeU5uZnRrTi10U256OXMtRGc?oc=5" target="_blank">. @EricTrump: "JPMorgan was crapping al…

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Will Help Power Anthropic's Claude in Surprise AI Deal
item.description: Elon Musk’s combined company of SpaceX and xAI will help boost Anthropic with a deal to provide compute for Claude AI models.

item.title: Bittrex Wants Its $24 Million Settlement Back, Now That the SEC Is Pro-Crypto
item.description: Now-shuttered crypto exchange Bittrex settled with the SEC back in 2023 after being accused of offering illegally unregistered securities.

item.title: Yesterday our trend model for Bitcoin turned positive and we took a position in our Tactica program, which is now fully invested. $BTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9BV0pQNTg2ejFhN283ZmZDdHBLckx2WlIySG1wQUlUS095S0haYlpGYTZOWU5INFJXbjVYd2x5UEk4dHJsek51bTBpUm9HcFJlZkRTdWNuNlFqeDA?oc=5" target="_blank">Yesterday our trend model for Bitcoin turne…

item.title: In line with the technical plan outlined below, the attacker's rsETH positions on Aave have been liquidated on Ethereum and Arbitrum. The liquidated collateral now sits with the Recovery Guardian as specified in the AIP. No other users were affected, and Umb - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE9IaV9NSFVkQ252MUlTQ2FQOXNWTWZvUThLZHJBblN6alV6THpvdWU3VFZ5RnpjSmJRZXZEY21vTVY2TllLOXpzY2k3VU9EUmlMc3lUaFpIY2Y?oc=5" target="_blank">In line with the technical plan outlined below,…

item.title: Hut 8 investors shrug off Q1 loss, stoke 33% stock surge
item.description: The company also announced a new AI energy leasing deal as it continues to diversify into adjacent high-performance computing applications.

item.title: Sandisk Is Mooning Like a Meme Coin. Here's Why
item.description: Sandisk stock is up over 3,000% in one year. It's not a meme. It's NAND flash—and AI can't get enough of it.

item.title: Ondo, JPMorgan, Mastercard and Ripple Team to Settle Tokenized Treasuries on XRP Ledger
item.description: Major financial institutions use XRP Ledger to demonstrate blockchain's ability to settle tokenized Treasuries across borders in seconds.

item.title: Crypto-backed Republican candidate wins Indiana congressional primary
item.description: Representative James Baird won the Republican primary for Indiana's 4th district on Tuesday after receiving an endorsement from Donald Trump and supportive spending from a crypto-backed PAC.

item.title: OKX to Launch OpenAI, SpaceX and Anthropic Perpetual Futures in Pre-IPO Trading Push
item.description: Crypto exchange OKX will offer synthetic exposure to private AI and tech company valuations through derivatives contracts.

item.title: Anthropic signs Elon Musk's SpaceX for Colossus 1 compute ahead of June IPO
item.description: The Claude maker said Wednesday it would use all the compute capacity at SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center, the latest partnership stitched onto its AI infrastructure buildout.

item.title: Eric Trump takes shot at JPMorgan rethinking bitcoin after 'crapping' on asset
item.description: The U.S. president's son, who co-founded American Bitcoin, said there's been a turnaround from traditional institutional firms now embracing bitcoin.

item.title: Claude Delusion? Richard Dawkins Believes AI May Be Conscious
item.description: The evolutionary biologist says extended exchanges with Anthropic’s chatbot felt less like software and more like interacting with another mind.

item.title: Price predictions 5/6: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, ZEC
item.description: Bitcoin sellers may show up if BTC hits $84,000, but altcoin charts continue to predict new price highs.

item.title: Switzerland's Amina becomes first regulated bank to custody Canton Coin
item.description: The FINMA-regulated bank's institutional clients will get access to trading and holding Canton Coin through a banking platform instead of crypto-native venues.

item.title: Google DeepMind Takes Stake in 'Eve Online' Maker, Will Use Game to Test AI Behavior
item.description: The wild world of space simulation game Eve Online will soon become an AI research destination for Google DeepMind thanks to a new deal.

item.title: 🔥 BULLISH: LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman says “crypto is the obvious answer” for AI-era online identity. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5yT1VJTzRqeTdCcjZEMThsN25fdVZueW9NVTRtSVRfajVTQkhUUXNOQzU4VG1Fd05hNS1yRHQ1WDFSSEdEVXktMXpJcEh2Qy1SM1BNQkpQMDg4WkZrRGlDZUtnSVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BULLISH: LinkedIn co-founder…

item.title: Ether tests $2.4K as accumulators add 246K ETH: How high can price go?
item.description: Ether could rise as high as $3,500 in the coming days, fueled by rising balances in Ethereum accumulation wallets and a strengthening technical structure.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy Yield ETN Gives UK Investors Exposure to Bitcoin Giant's STRC Shares
item.description: The 21Shares exchange-traded note gives U.K. investors exposure to preferred shares of top Bitcoin treasury firm, Strategy.

item.title: Reform UK’s Farage Claims 'No Obligation' to Declare Tether Billionaire's $6.7M Gift
item.description: Farage insisted that the gift from Christopher Harborne was for his personal security and had been reviewed “from every legal angle.”

item.title: Bitcoin slips from $83K after Trump questions Iran truce
item.description: Bitcoin price action failed to revisit the $83,000 mark after US-Iran war tensions took over to steer the crypto market mood.
